name: Greymatter
description: Greymatter — Enterprise service mesh platform with integrated API gateway, observability, and policy enforcement.

seo.title: Greymatter — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Greymatter: Greymatter — Enterprise service mesh platform with integrated API gateway, observability, and policy enforcement.

when_to_use: Enterprise service mesh with API gateway and policy enforcement
Observability and traffic management across microservices
Federal and defense-grade service mesh with security controls
mTLS and zero-trust network policies for Kubernetes services
Unified control plane for hybrid cloud microservice deployments

cons: Lock-in if you standardize on it
review.verdict: A heavyweight, enterprise-focused service mesh for regulated platforms, overkill for most product teams.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises and government needing integrated mesh and gateway
review.not_for: Product teams that can get by with Linkerd or plain Istio

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
